creator: beastie@tardisi.com
text:
corrected patch attached

On 08/27/2013 03:41, Cy Schubert wrote:
> Packing list is incorrect. I can't look at it right now as I'm importing 
> some code into base. This'll have to wait for a couple of weeks or more but 
> if you want to expedite things you can patch up pkg-plist  yourself.
> 
> pkg_delete: unable to completely remove directory '/usr/local/share/cfengine
> /CoreBase/lib'
> pkg_delete: unable to completely remove directory '/usr/local/share/cfengine
> /CoreBase'
> pkg_delete: unable to completely remove directory '/usr/local/share/cfengine
> '
> pkg_delete: couldn't entirely delete package `cfengine35-3.5.1.3'
> (perhaps the packing list is incorrectly specified?)
> 
> SLIPPY# diff files.before files.after 
> SLIPPY# diff dirs.before dirs.after 
> 29763a29764,29768
>> /usr/local/share/cfengine
>> /usr/local/share/cfengine/CoreBase
>> /usr/local/share/cfengine/CoreBase/lib
>> /usr/local/share/cfengine/CoreBase/lib/3.5
>> /usr/local/share/cfengine/CoreBase/lib/3.6
> SLIPPY# diff links.before links.after 
> SLIPPY# 
>
